_comment: KickTipp scoring scheme. Edit to match your specific KickTipp league config.

risiko_bonus._comment_formula: bonus = max(0, floor(decimal_odds_for_tipped_outcome - 1.0)). decimal_odds = 1 / bookmaker_probability. Example: p=0.50 -> odds=2.0 -> bonus=1; p=0.33 -> bonus=2; p=0.25 -> bonus=3.
